recommendations.title: The Disaster Artist
recommendations.overview: An aspiring actor in Hollywood meets an enigmatic stranger by the name of Tommy Wiseau, the meeting leads the actor down a path nobody could have predicted; creating the worst movie ever made.

recommendations.title: In Dubious Battle
recommendations.overview: In the California apple country, 900 migratory workers rise 'in dubious battle' against the landowners. The group takes on a life of its own—stronger than its individual members, and more frightening. Led by the doomed Jim Nolan, the strike is founde

recommendations.title: The Institute
recommendations.overview: In 19th century Baltimore, Isabel Porter, a girl stricken with grief from her parents' untimely death, voluntarily checks herself into the Rosewood Institute. Subjected to bizarre and increasingly violent pseudo-scientific experiments in personality

recommendations.title: Kin
recommendations.overview: A young boy finds a powerful otherworldly weapon, which he uses to save his older adoptive brother from a crew of thugs. Before long, the two of them are also pursued by federal agents and mysterious mercenaries aiming to reclaim their asset.

recommendations.title: Marina Abramović: The Artist Is Present
recommendations.overview: Performance artist Marina Abramovic prepares for a major retrospective of her work at the Museum of Modern Art in New York.

recommendations.title: Why Him?
recommendations.overview: A dad forms a bitter rivalry with his daughter's young rich boyfriend.

recommendations.title: Tristan & Isolde
recommendations.overview: An affair between the second in line to Britain's throne and the princess of the feuding Irish spells doom for the young lovers.

recommendations.title: Pineapple Express
recommendations.overview: A stoner and his dealer are forced to go on the run from the police after the pothead witnesses a cop commit a murder.

recommendations.title: The Show
recommendations.overview: An unsettling look at reality television, where a disturbing game show has its contestants ending their lives for the public's enjoyment.

recommendations.title: The Forsaken
recommendations.overview: A young man is in a race against time as he searches for a cure after becoming infected with a virus that will eventually turn him into a blood-sucking vampire.
